tip: [Eusan Nation] Great holes secretly are digged where earth's pores ought to suffice, and things have learnt to walk that ought to crawl.

[Eusan Nation] A Replika is a biomechanical humanoid maufactured by the Eusan Nation. The process to making them is tighly guarded secret but everyone knows that neural patterns from select citizens are used

[Eusan Nation] ADLR (Administration-, Datenverarbeitung-, Logistik-Replika), (Administration, Data Processing, Logistics Replika 'Eagle') or Adler, are Generation 5 High Command Specialist Replikas. Adlers are Protektor Führungskommando Administrator units managing and overseeing all administrative tasks for entire facilities
[Eusan Nation] ARAR (Allzweck-Reparatur-Arbeiter Replika), (All-Purpose Repair Worker Replika 'Macaw') or Ara, are Generation 2 Low-Cost General Purpose Replikas used in construction and repair.

[Eusan Nation] EULR (Einfache Universelle Leichte Replika), (Simple Universal Light Replika 'Owl') or Eule, are Generation 4 Low-Cost General Purpose Replikas. They are used in domestic tasks such as serving as Cooks, Nurses, Cleaning, as well as Simple Medical and Office duties

[Eusan Nation] FKLR (Führungskommando-Leitenheit-Replika), (Operational Command Control Unit Replika 'Falcon') or Falke, are Generation 6 High-Tech Bioresonance Command Replikas. They are the most advanced Replika type in service with the Eusan Nation and occupy command positions for Protektor units

[Eusan Nation] KLBR (Kommando-Leiteinheit Bioresonaztechnik-Replika), (Commando Control Unit Bioresonance Technology Replika 'Hummingbird') or Kolibri, are Generation 6 High-Tech Bioresonance Specialist Replikas. They are advanced Replikas acting as support for the FLKR unit.

[Eusan Nation] LSTR (Landvermessungs-/Schiff-Techniker Replika), (Land Survey/Ship Technician Replika 'Magpie') or Elster, are Generation 5 Kosmo-Pioneer Specialist Replikas. Primarily used as Combat Engineers and Technicians.
